violations.text: The following non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned: 1) The non-food contact surfaces of the mixer (above the attachments) were observed with food debris 2) The fan covers in the walk-in cooler were observed with an accumulation of dust New Violation. Correct By: 03/24/2026

One of the bays of the food prep sink was observed with an air-break. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026
